source_pr.title: planner: function name in `ErrWindowInvalidWindowFuncUse` should be lowercase
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
window function: function name of ErrWindowInvalidWindowFuncUse should be lowercase.
Closes #11508 

### What is changed and how it works?
warp Function name with strings.ToLower()

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: sql: "delete from t order by (SUM(a) over())", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "delete from t order by (SUM(a) over())", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "delete from t order by (SUM(a) over())", (planner/core/logical_plan_test.go)
